extraction.one_line_summary: FORMOLO David escaped over Col de la Madeleine and held off ROGLIČ by 33 seconds after soloing 40+ km, while THOMAS Geraint cracked early.
tactical_patterns: FORMOLO attacked over Madeleine with 4:19 gap, calculated perfectly to hold 33s versus ROGLIČ finishing acceleration pattern.
Jumbo-Visma deployed four riders to dismantle Ineos morale systematically, KUSS finishing final turns before ROGLIČ accelerated for bonus seconds.
THOMAS Geraint dropped before doing any work early on final climb, revealing hidden weakness versus team expectations.
MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe counterattacked inside final kilometer when ROGLIČ hesitated, nearly catching solo leader before absorption.

rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: positive: Italian champion executed 40+km solo with perfect power management, descending scared but holding gap calculation precisely
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: destroyed field with late acceleration for bonus seconds, demonstrated Jumbo-Visma superiority with four-rider mountain train
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: dropped early on final climb without contributing work, 15:42 down suggests tour leadership battle ended
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: distanced 12km from summit with CASTROVIEJO pacing him back, clearly not contending for GC
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: ex-mountain biker looked ominous finishing final Jumbo-Visma shift, controlled pace to summit without cracking
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: dropped early on climb, likely conserving for stage hunting rather than GC contention
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: neutral: finished group behind THOMAS but survived Jumbo-Visma decimation, leadership ambiguity remains
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: dropped before contributing work, Ineos depth exposed by Jumbo-Visma's systematic destruction
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: attacked inside final kilometer nearly catching FORMOLO, strongest Ineos climber on display
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: distanced early on climb, poor race form continues
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: paced then stopped completely at 12km, executed domestique role before elimination
